text: What is one thing your partner does that always makes you smile?

text: Give your partner a 30-second hand massage.

text: What was your first impression of your partner?

text: Look into your partner's eyes for 60 seconds without speaking.

text: What is your favorite memory together as a couple?

text: Write three things you love about your partner on their palm with your finger.
